name: mempalace-cloud
description: Persistent AI memory as a service — connect to MemPalace Cloud via OAuth MCP. Includes memory protocol skill.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent AI memory as a service
interface.longDescription: Give your AI a persistent, cross-session memory backed by MemPalace Cloud. OAuth MCP — no local setup, no API keys. Recall facts before answering, save learnings after tasks.
defaultPrompt: What do you remember about my preferences?
Search my memories for recent decisions
Remember that I prefer TypeScript for web projects
